segments.text: Praise the Lord! Praise the name of the Lord; give praise, O servants of the Lord,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: who stand in the house of the Lord, in the courts of the house of our God!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise the Lord, for the Lord is good; sing to his name, for it is pleasant!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord has chosen Jacob for himself, Israel as his own possession.
For I know that the Lord is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.
Whatever the Lord pleases, he does, in heaven and on earth, in the seas and all deeps.
He it is who makes the clouds rise at the end of the earth, who makes lightnings for the rain and brings forth the wind from his storehouses.
He it was who struck down the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and of beast;

footnotes: both…: Heb. from man unto beast

segments.text: who sent signs and wonders into your midst, O Egypt, against Pharaoh and all his servants;
who struck down many nations and killed mighty kings,
Sihon, king of the Amorites, and Og, king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan,
and gave their land as a heritage, a heritage to his people Israel.
Your name, O Lord, endures forever, your renown, O Lord, throughout all generations.

footnotes: throughout…: Heb. to generation and generation

segments.text: For the Lord will vindicate his people and have compassion on his servants.
The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of human hands.
They have mouths, but do not speak; they have eyes, but do not see;
they have ears, but do not hear, nor is there any breath in their mouths.
Those who make them become like them, so do all who trust in them.
O house of Israel, bless the Lord! O house of Aaron, bless the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: O house of Levi, bless the Lord! You who fear the Lord, bless the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed be the Lord from Zion, he who dwells in Jerusalem! Praise the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
